<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: Created .github/copilot-instructions.md for workspace-specific setup tracking.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: User requested a React SPA with a single presentational invitation page.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Manually scaffolded a Vite-compatible React app in the current workspace after the Vite CLI required interactive input for the current directory.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Replaced the starter app with a single invitation page and custom styling in src/App.jsx and src/index.css.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions were required by the Vite project setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Installed dependencies, verified diagnostics were clean, and confirmed npm run build succeeds.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Created and started a VS Code task that runs the Vite dev server with npm run dev -- --host.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: The dev server is running and the app is available locally at http://localhost:5173/.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: Added README.md and updated this file to reflect the completed project state.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
